description_long: This is a single-story rectangular house situated on a large, flat grassy lot. The house features a simple, low-pitched gable roof in a muted gray color, with white exterior walls and minimal decorative elements. Windows are symmetrically arranged on the front and rear facades, with two windows flanking a central entry door on the front. The entryway is modest, lacking a porch or overhang, and is accessed directly from the lawn. The side elevations have fewer windows, emphasizing the house's straightforward, functional design. The overall appearance suggests a practical, suburban residential structure with a focus on simplicity and utility.
description: A single-story, rectangular house with a gray gable roof and white walls, set on a large grassy lot. Symmetrical windows and a central front door define its simple, suburban style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central entry door flanked by two windows, with the gable roof and white facade clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, plain wall with minimal window openings and the full length of the gable roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a similar window arrangement to the front, but without a visible entry door.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other long wall, again with minimal window openings and the roof's slope.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry door with no porch or overhang, accessed directly from the lawn, flanked by two windows.
